name: 3D Blade Grass Visualizer
description: Canvas-projected 3D turf field you orbit and zoom, with live sliders for pile height, density, wind, blade shape, color and weather that reshape the grass and surface a live product match.

name: Push-Mower Scroll Reveal
description: On scroll an SVG push-mower drives left→right clipping away an uncut-turf overlay to reveal the cards behind it, wheels spinning and cut-grass flecks trailing; fires once, static under reduced motion.

name: Pointer-Reactive Gradient Wash
description: A soft neon radial glow that eases toward the cursor behind the content, rAF-throttled via CSS vars with a fixed counter-glow for depth; static under reduced motion and touch.

name: 3D Tilt Card with Glare
description: Each card tilts in 3D toward the pointer with a restrained max angle and a light-glare highlight tracking across its face; GPU-composited, flat on touch and reduced motion.

name: Cinematic Video Overture Hero
description: A full-bleed muted aerial video plays on load; when it ends the wordmark flies to the corner, headline lines rise in sequence and a photo crossfades in behind, with a Skip control.

name: Draggable Product Row Carousel
description: Horizontal snap carousel of product cards (Embla) with drag/touch and keyboard arrow buttons that dim and disable at each end; ~1.2/2/3/4 cards across breakpoints.

name: Green-Caret Typewriter
description: JS typewriter that types a string character-by-character with a blinking caret, retypes cleanly on new text; full text instant with no caret under reduced motion.

name: IntersectionObserver Scroll Reveal
description: Lightweight reveal-on-scroll wrapper toggling transform/opacity with up/left/right/fade directions and optional delay/repeat; cheap for dozens of elements, instant under reduced motion.

name: Heading Mask-Rise
description: A heading rises from translateY(110%) inside an overflow clip so the words sweep up out of a mask on view or mount; the signature title entrance used across sections.

name: Staggered Group Reveal
description: Wraps a group of children so they enter with one observer and a per-child animation-delay cascade (rise/fade/dock); one coherent motion signature for grids and lists.

name: Product-Match Quiz Wizard
description: Six-step guided quiz of emoji option-cards (use, traffic, climate, pets, priority, sqft) with a progress bar and fade transitions that resolves to a tailored recommendation.

name: Interactive Store Locator
description: Leaflet map with keyless light tiles and staggered pin drops; a ZIP/city search geocodes and reorders branch cards nearest-first, flying to the closest pin, degrading gracefully if geocoding is down.

name: Aurora Marquee Testimonials
description: Two frosted-glass review rows auto-scroll in opposite directions over drifting aurora blobs, with a cursor spotlight and blob parallax; hovered row pauses, static grid under reduced motion.

name: Click-to-Play Video Testimonials
description: Grid of testimonial cards that play with sound on click, each swapping an honest 'coming soon' face for the real clip, with client/partner badges and optional quote captions.

name: Autoplay Video Reel Strip
description: A horizontal snap strip of vertical 9:16 clips that autoplay muted on scroll; a single mute toggle per card ensures only one audio track plays, tap-to-play under reduced motion.

name: Floating Cutout Parallax
description: A transparent product cutout drifts gently on scroll via a rAF CSS translate with a soft drop shadow so it reads as floating; static under reduced motion.

name: Delivery Estimate + Installer Tool
description: Product + ZIP + quantity form that posts to an API and returns an estimated-delivery card with zone/rolls/freight stats plus recommended local installer cards; spinner/timeout/error fallbacks.

name: Animated Spec Count-Up Cards
description: Large numeric spec cards that ease-count from zero on scroll, preserving units and decimals and shrinking for non-numeric strings; snaps to final under reduced motion.

name: Landscape Product Detail Page
description: Full product template: parallax floating-cutout hero with type/color chips, animated 4-up spec grid, side-profile bleed, backing-material split band, spec ledger and hover-zoom gallery, torn-edge dividers.

name: Border-Draw Category Cards
description: Large near-square category cards where a green hairline border draws itself (SVG pathLength) staggered left→right, then image and content fade in; redraws once on hover.

name: Streaming AI Chat Widget
description: A floating launcher opens a chat panel with quick-question chips that streams assistant tokens over SSE into growing bubbles, auto-scrolls, and falls back to a phone number if the stream fails.

name: Warranty Claim Form + Photo Upload
description: Structured claim form with grouped product select, a client-side image compressor and multi-photo upload (min 3, thumbnails, remove), full inline validation, honeypot and a success state.

name: Typed-Eyebrow Manifesto
description: A mission block whose eyebrow types in with a green caret, heading mask-rises, and paragraphs stagger up; a home pull-line variant and a full-statement variant share the motion.

name: Plus/Minus FAQ Accordion
description: Categorized FAQ where rows expand via a 0fr→1fr grid animation (no measuring) with an animated plus→minus toggle, correct heading levels and ARIA; groups toggle independently.

name: Backing Cross-Section Diagrams
description: Data-driven cards each render an SVG cutaway of the product's construction — blades over stacked colored backing layers with drainage perforations — plus a legend and 'found on' chips.

name: Sticky Selection Quote Tray
description: A persistent tray that appears once items are added to a shared selection — full-width bar on mobile, corner pill on desktop — showing the count with View-quote and clear actions.

name: Lenis + GSAP Smooth Scroll
description: App-wide smooth scrolling via Lenis bridged to GSAP's ticker as the single RAF driver so scroll-scrub effects share one timeline; disabled for reduced-motion.

name: Editorial Collage Bento
description: A flagship collage: one large feature tile, two stacked, then a row of smaller tiles, images fading up staggered, name-tags stamping in with overshoot, a green glint running once along a rule.

name: Faceted-Filter Catalog
description: Sticky sidebar of checkbox facets built from the live data, with active-filter chips, clear-all and a body-locking mobile drawer; products regroup by series as filters change.

name: Add-to-Quote Variant Cards
description: Accessory cards with size/variant chip selectors and an add/remove-to-quote toggle wired to a shared store, a green border-draw on hover, and an honest 'photo coming soon' placeholder.

name: Install Materials Calculator
description: A takeoff calculator: infill and seam choice tiles feed an API that returns an itemized materials list with quantities, units and per-line reasons; an on-brand result ledger.

name: Click-to-Load PDF Preview
description: A catalog/document preview that mounts its iframe only after the visitor clicks a framed 'Load preview' button, keeping heavy PDFs off first paint.

name: Branch Location Cards Grid
description: A staggered grid of branch cards showing address, per-branch phone and manager, hours and a Directions link, driven from a locations config and reusable across pages.

name: Two-Column Contact Page
description: Contact template with a dark headline strip then a two-column layout — message form with dock-in reveals left, direct per-store contact right — followed by a location-cards grid.

name: Async Lead Form + Inline Status
description: A lead form that validates inline, posts via fetch, disables and swaps to 'Sending…', then replaces itself with a success or error block plus a honeypot guard.

name: Pinned Scroll-Scrub Hero
description: A GSAP ScrollTrigger-pinned hero that scrubs a mini timeline as you scroll — background parallaxes, a 'pour' still crossfades to 'lit', copy rises — static on mobile and reduced motion.

name: Three-Column Craft Story
description: A three-column editorial story block, each column led by a thin accent rule over a serif heading and body, revealing with a staggered scroll fade and a closing 'meet the maker' link.

name: Count-Up on Scroll
description: Numbers ease-count from zero to a data target with prefix/suffix/decimals when scrolled into view via IntersectionObserver; snaps to final value under reduced motion.

name: Stock-Badge Collection Grid
description: Product cards carrying In Stock / Selling Out / Sold Out badges, tasting-note copy and hover accent border, where sold-out items swap the CTA for an inline expand-to-email 'notify me' form.

name: Batch Waitlist Capture
description: A centered 'get first access' email capture with an optional which-scent field that swaps to an inline confirmation on submit; scarcity-framed drop/restock signup.

name: Themed Reviews Over Photo
description: A reviews band over a darkened full-bleed photo: an aggregate star score + count header above a grid of themed 5-star cards summarizing review patterns without fabricated quotes.

name: Split Image Feature + Pill Facts
description: A two-column feature: rounded cover image one side, eyebrow + heading + paragraph and a row of pill 'fact' chips (duration, price, location) plus CTA the other; reveals staggered.

name: Inline Credential Trust Strip
description: A slim band of pipe-divided credibility signals (rating · location · materials, or license/insured/BBB/years) sitting right under the hero for instant trust.

name: Custom Commission Intake Form
description: A bespoke-inquiry form pairing structured selects (event type, quantity, target date) with an open 'describe it in your own words' textarea and contact fields, resolving to a personal confirmation.

name: Restaurant Menu Ledger
description: A typographic price-list menu grouped into sections, each item a divided row with name + description left and price right, plus inline highlight tags (Fan Favorite, Spicy).

name: Menu Card Grid with Feature
description: Menu presented as a grid of cards (name + price + tasting note) where one specialty card gets an accent border and a 'House Specialty' ribbon; boutique, curated feel.

name: Full Menu Page Template
description: Standalone menu route: cream page-header intro, multiple ledger categories, an allergy note and a closing order CTA banner; a complete drop-in menu page.

name: Photo Hero + Gradient Overlay
description: Edge-to-edge lifestyle photo behind a three-stop dark gradient overlay, with an eyebrow label, oversized serif headline and dual pill CTAs; warm and appetite-forward.

name: Pure-CSS Masonry Gallery
description: A column-based masonry photo wall using CSS columns + break-inside (no JS), collapsing 3→2→1 columns responsively; casual, scrapbook feel.

name: Masonry Gallery + Lightbox
description: A multi-column grid with col-span feature tiles and gradient-to-caption overlays that opens a full-screen modal lightbox with prev/next arrows and keyboard dismiss.

name: Diagonal Stripe Divider
description: A decorative full-width band between sections built from a repeating-linear-gradient stripe pattern; a lightweight texture break with zero images.

name: Mobile Sticky Call Bar
description: A fixed bottom-of-viewport tap-to-call CTA bar shown only on mobile for local-service businesses, keeping the phone action always in reach.

name: Oversized Quote-Mark Reviews
description: Testimonial cards each opened by a giant serif quotation glyph, an italic quote and an uppercase location/author footer with small stars; editorial and warm.

name: Services Image-Card Grid
description: A responsive grid of service cards, each a cover photo over a title + benefit blurb, closing with a 'view all' CTA row; the core offering showcase for a trades site.

name: Local Business Multi-Page Shell
description: A full local-service site shell: sticky header + hamburger drawer, image hero, trust strip, service/gallery grids, review snippet, CTA band, service-area footer and mobile call bar.

name: WebGL Cursor-Reactive Vapor Hero
description: A full-screen GLSL fragment-shader smoke/vapor field (layered fbm noise, warm-on-charcoal ramp, vignette) that distorts toward the cursor, with a CSS-gradient fallback.

name: Scroll-Linked Pill Reveal
description: A row of hero category pills whose opacity and translateY are driven directly by scroll progress mapped to a viewport fraction, fading up as the user begins scrolling.

name: Sticky Filter-Tab Catalog
description: A horizontally-scrollable sticky tab bar (All + categories) with an underline-active state that filters which category sections render below; a client-side catalog browser.

name: Alternating Image/Text Rows
description: Two-column rows pairing a category writeup + brand chip cloud + inline call link with a cover photo, degrading to a dashed 'photos coming soon' placeholder when no image exists.

name: Icon Stat Trust Strip
description: An auto-fit row of divided stat cells, each an SVG icon beside a bold value, uppercase label and small sub-line (rating/hours/locations); a compact credibility band.

name: Multi-Location Map Cards
description: A grid of location cards, each a color-filtered embedded Google Map over address, per-day hours with a highlighted late-night row, phone and directions; primary gets a 'Main' badge.

name: Google Reviews Aggregate Trio
description: A three-card review block combining one real attributed quote, an aggregate-rating summary (score + count + read-on-Google link) and a numeric teaser linking to a full reviews page.

name: Viewport-Gated Canvas Framework
description: A tiny vanilla-JS registry where each data-anim canvas gets a per-frame draw(ctx,w,h,t), runs only while on-screen via IntersectionObserver, DPR-scales, reads brand colors from CSS vars.

name: Domain Live-Signal Canvas Set
description: A themed family of looping canvas 'live signals' — ECG sweep, glucose curve, orbiting molecules, sleep breathing, firing neuron network, VO2 ring — each tinted to its domain accent.

name: Interactive SVG Orbit Hero
description: A hero of a glowing 'core' with color-coded system nodes on orbit rings, each a link, with slow rotation and a subtle pointer-parallax lift of the group on desktop; a navigable hub diagram.

name: Biomarker Range-Bar Cards
description: A grid of metric cards showing a value + unit, an optimal/normal band track and a status marker that animates to its data target on scroll, plus optimal/watch/alert badges; clinical aesthetic.

name: Score Ring + Percentile Curve
description: A composite dataviz panel: an SVG circular gauge that fills via stroke-dashoffset on view around a big central score, beside a bell-curve marking 'you vs peers' percentile.

name: Multi-Step Assessment Quiz
description: A multi-step wizard with a numbered progress rail + fill bar, chip/segment choice controls, per-step validation, localStorage persistence, a live slider readout and a success confirmation.

name: Condition / Domain Page Template
description: A repeatable per-topic page — accent-themed domain hero with its own live-signal canvas, a narrow intro and a biomarker range-card grid — a content system driven by one accent per page.

name: Signup + Password-Strength Meter
description: An account form with a live password-strength bar scored on length/number/symbol/case with a word label, full inline validation and an in-place success confirmation.

name: Scent-Family Filter Catalog
description: A shop page with rounded filter-pill tabs that filter product cards by category, each carrying a stock badge and sold-out notify form, capped by a which-scent waitlist band.

name: WebGL2 Interactive Particle Hero
description: Raw WebGL2 point-cloud of 700-2400 particles that drift and repel from the cursor over a dimmed photo + vignette; a living atmospheric field.

name: Frosted-Glass CTA Card
description: Centered glass card over a busy background: eyebrow, headline, sub-line, call/directions buttons. Premium, legible over motion.

name: Gradient Clipped-Text Headline
description: Headline words painted with a background-clip gradient so key phrases glow against dark type. Instant emphasis, no extra markup.

name: Animated Scroll-Down Indicator
description: A mouse glyph pinned to the hero bottom with a bouncing dot + Scroll label; a quiet nudge to keep going.

name: Auto-Wiring Reveal System
description: Drop-in engine: any .reveal element fades/slides in on scroll, with reveal-delay-N stagger and a MutationObserver auto-wiring newly added nodes.

name: Ambient Radial Glow Orbs
description: Large off-canvas radial-gradient blobs bled into section corners to add depth + color temperature to flat dark backgrounds.

name: Icon Trust / Stat Band
description: Bordered grid of stat tiles (icon chip + big value + label + sub-line), one tile tap-to-call; a compact credibility strip.

name: Verified Quote + Theme Cards
description: One hero verbatim star-rated quote paired with smaller recurring-theme icon cards + a source-link chip. Honest proof, no invented quotes.

name: Category Card Grid + Featured Photos
description: Auto-fill grid of icon category cards + browse-all link, then a two-up featured-photo row and accent callout; a what-we-carry teaser.

name: Split Text/Image + Overlay Badge
description: Two-column narrative: staggered-reveal copy beside a framed photo with a blurred glass caption badge; a warm story block.

name: Address / Hours / Map Block
description: Find-us section: address, tap-to-call, hours list and a storefront photo beside a tall embedded map. Everything a walk-in needs.

name: Dark-Mode Google Maps Embed
description: CSS-only trick that dark-themes any embedded Google Map (invert + hue-rotate) so it matches a dark site with no API key.

name: Glowing Tap-to-Call Closing CTA
description: Closing CTA band over a faint photo + radial glow: eyebrow, headline, an oversized glowing phone button, hours/address reminders.

name: Cinematic Volumetric 3D Scene
description: three.js hero: a slow-spinning fresnel-glass DNA helix with a radiation break, transmission crystals, GPGPU dust, ACES + bloom.

name: GPGPU Curl-Noise Particle Dust
description: 25k GPU points advected by divergence-free curl noise in a ping-ponged float texture, pulled to an attractor, drawn additively.

name: Parametric Double-Helix Geometry
description: Code-defined DNA double helix (turns/rise/radius params) from CatmullRom tubes, colored rungs, phosphate nodes and a Gaussian break.

name: Three-Band Composite Depth
description: Depth from three layers at different rates: far parallax backdrop, mid 3D scene, near screen-blended bokeh parallaxed to the pointer.

name: Cinematic Post-FX Grade Stack
description: EffectComposer chain — ACES tone map, threshold UnrealBloom, then radial chromatic aberration + vignette + lift; the filmic grade.

name: Film Grain + Vignette Overlay
description: Two fixed pointer-through layers — an SVG fractal-noise grain and a radial vignette — over any page for cheap analog-film atmosphere.

name: Multi-Screen Journey Page
description: Single-page multi-screen experience: ask → mini-game → pick → quiz → confirm, with rise transitions, step dots and persistent state.

name: Evasive No + Magnetic Yes Buttons
description: The No button sprouts legs and flees the cursor while Yes grows, sprouts wings, magnetically leans in and fills a power meter.

name: 3D Flip-Card Grid
description: Auto-fill grid of cards that rotateY-flip on hover to a back face (emoji, place, link), with selected/flash state + touch fallback.

name: Chip Filter + Live Budget Total
description: Pill/chip category filter over a card list, wired to a running cost pill that live-sums selected items and swaps copy as picks change.

name: Canvas Spin-the-Wheel Picker
description: A modal canvas roulette of colored segments that spins with easing to randomly land on and select an option; a gamified decision.

name: Cursor-Steered Mini-Game
description: A themed canvas dodge game (steer with mouse/touch, evade N hazards to unlock the next screen) with hit anims and a win gate.

name: Procedural WebAudio SFX + Score
description: A no-asset audio layer: synthesized clicks/chimes/whooshes + a looping lo-fi bed whose filter and detune intensify with a danger value.

name: Confetti / Heart Particle Cannon
description: Full-screen canvas FX firing gravity-driven confetti and heart bursts from screen edges on celebration moments; reward feedback.

name: Black-Hole Swallow + Countdown
description: A finale that scale-spins the whole stage into a canvas black hole, then fades to a glowing ring countdown to the saved date.

name: Typewriter Multi-Line Note
description: A blinking-cursor typewriter that types a scripted sequence of lines with randomized timing + a rotating reason-#N ticker.

name: Ticket Confirmation + Calendar/SMS
description: A boarding-pass confirmation card (gradient stub, punched edge, detail rows) with .ics download, SMS share and maps link.

name: Floating Polaroids Ambient Layer
description: A fixed background of CSS polaroid cards drifting slowly upward and rotating on randomized loops; a warm in-motion atmosphere.

name: Themed Fake-Progress Preloader
description: An intro overlay with a randomized fake progress bar, an equalizer animation and icon swaps, that fades out and starts the page.

name: Photo Hero + Floating Meta Pills
description: Full-bleed photo under a dark gradient overlay, eyebrow + headline + dual CTAs, and a row of glassy info pills (hours, walk-ins, address) pinned to the hero base.

name: Gradient Hero with Radial Glow
description: No-photo dark hero from a diagonal brand gradient plus an off-center radial glow; serif headline feels premium and loads instantly.

name: Illustrated SVG Mascot Hero
description: Split hero pairing copy with a hand-built inline-SVG character (water-drop mascot with sun rays, glow, shine, blush) — friendly, brandable, zero image assets.

name: Parallax Split-Plate Hero
description: GSAP hero: copy left, an image plate right with independently parallaxing bg + defocused fg layers and staggered headline lines that fade up on load.

name: Trust / Stat Bar Strip
description: Proof strip under the hero — rating, review count, credential stats as big-number + label pairs separated by thin dividers; icon-prefixed variant too.

name: Rating Summary Hero Card
description: Centerpiece card leading a reviews section: oversized rating number, a filled star row, and the review-count sub-line — anchors proof before the quotes.

name: Testimonial Card Grid
description: Responsive grid of review cards, each with a star row, quote and author/service meta; a decorative oversized open-quote glyph is a variant accent.

name: Honest Empty-State Reviews
description: Reviews section for brand-new businesses: a giant serif quote mark, a candid 'we are gathering reviews' paragraph, and a call-us CTA instead of fabricated testimonials.

name: SVG Icon Feature / Services Grid
description: Grid of cards each led by a custom inline-SVG line icon (or emoji), a heading and a short blurb; services, differentiators, what-we-do.

name: Two-Column Price Ledger
description: Menu-style services + pricing: name flush-left, 'from $XX' flush-right in accent serif, each row a hairline border — reads like a spa/salon price sheet.

name: Problem / Pain-Point Card Grid
description: Cards that name a customer problem as the headline (Selling your car?, Green cloudy water) with an icon and an empathetic solution paragraph — converts by mirroring intent.

name: Alternating Image/Text Split + Bullets
description: Photo-and-copy split rows that flip left/right on alternate sections, each with eyebrow, headline, checklist and CTA; reveals on scroll.

name: Floating Stat Badge on Photo
description: An overlapping accent badge (big number + label, e.g. 332 5-Star Reviews) pinned to a portrait photo corner to add proof without a separate section.

name: Accessible Lightbox Gallery
description: Click/keyboard gallery grid with hover captions; opens a full-screen lightbox with prev/next, Esc/arrows, focus restore and scroll lock — pure JS.

name: Masonry CSS-Columns Gallery
description: Pinterest-style masonry using CSS columns with break-inside tiles of varying heights, collapsing 3-2-1; works with photos or gradient placeholders.

name: Team / Staff Card Grid
description: Grid of staff cards (photo or gradient avatar) with name, role and one-line specialty; graceful placeholder-initial fallback when a headshot is missing.

name: Appointment Booking Widget
description: Self-contained booking flow: staff-picker chips, a month-navigable calendar (past disabled), a time-slot grid with taken slots greyed, a live summary and confirm/success — all client-side.

name: Booking Form + Image Dropzone
description: Two-column contact + request page whose standout is a drag-and-drop reference-photo dropzone with FileReader preview, filename and remove, plus an animated success panel.

name: Contact Form + Live Status States
description: Split contact section that POSTs to an API and swaps idle to sending to sent (checkmark) to error inline.

name: Sticky Mobile Call/Book Bar
description: Thumb-reachable fixed bottom bar on mobile with a single high-intent action (Call / Book); a variant reveals only once the hero scrolls out.

name: Transparent-to-Solid Scroll Nav
description: Fixed nav that starts transparent over the hero and swaps to solid/shadowed past a threshold, plus an animated hamburger drawer that locks scroll and auto-closes.

name: Full-Width CTA Band
description: Bold accent/dark closing band with a headline, sub, and a large phone or book action (often a big tappable phone number) — the recurring conversion closer above the footer.

name: Sticky Nav Bar
description: Persistent wayfinding and an always-reachable CTA.

name: Mega Menu
description: Exposes deep information architecture without deep clicking. Merchandising surface.

name: Command Palette (Cmd+K)
description: Keyboard-summoned search and actions. Signals 'built for pros'.

name: Minimal Typographic Hero
description: Confidence signal. Nothing to hide behind. Loads instantly.

name: Case Study / Results Cards
description: Numbers convert. '3x booked jobs' beats 'great to work with' every time.

name: Before / After Slider
description: Instantly legible proof of transformation. Tactile and unarguable.

name: Interactive Hotspots
description: Tappable points on a product reveal detail. Rewards curiosity, explains spatially.

name: Specifications / Comparison Table
description: Hard data for the evaluating buyer. The rational close.

name: Timeline
description: Milestones along a drawn line. Story, roadmap, or process.

name: Tiered Pricing Cards
description: Anchoring plus the compromise effect. Three options make the middle feel safe.

name: Pricing / ROI Calculator
description: The user talks themselves into the number. Reframes price as investment.

name: Mega Footer
description: Wayfinding, trust, SEO internal linking, and last-chance conversion. Not a dumping ground.

name: Oversized Statement Footer
description: Ends on personality. The giant 'let's talk' email link is the agency signature.

name: Blur In
description: Soft focus-pull entrance. Modern, calm.

name: Line-by-Line Text Reveal
description: Headline lines slide up from behind a mask, staggered. The premium editorial signature.

name: Horizontal Scroll Track
description: Vertical scroll input drives horizontal movement of a child track.
reduced_motion: track becomes a normal vertical stack or a swipeable carousel

name: Scroll Progress Indicator
description: Shows read position. Reduces abandonment on long pages.
reduced_motion: static or hidden; no motion required

name: Button Fill Sweep
description: Background fills across the button. Button feels like it charges up.

name: Text Roll Swap
description: Label rolls up and a duplicate rolls in behind it. Playful, crisp.

name: Shine Sweep
description: A skewed highlight travels across the surface. Premium product gloss.

name: Blend-Mode Cursor
description: Cursor inverts whatever is under it. Striking on high-contrast layouts.

name: Tab Switch
description: Swaps panel content with a sliding active indicator.

name: Drawer / Overlay Menu
description: Panel slides in from an edge or expands full-screen. Mobile nav and filter panels.

name: Spring Toggle
description: Switch knob springs to its new position. The most-felt micro-interaction on a page.

name: Carousel / Slider
description: Horizontally paged content with drag and momentum.

name: Page Transition Curtain
description: A panel wipes across between routes; the new page reveals behind it. Hides load, adds continuity.
reduced_motion: instant route change or short fade

name: Inline Validation
description: Field validates on blur with a specific, kind error or a satisfying check.

name: Success State
description: Confident confirmation after submit. Closes the loop and kills post-submit anxiety.

name: Copy Confirmation
description: Button flips to 'Copied' on click.
